description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has multiple jobs for different environments, including macOS Sonoma ARM with CMake installed, ROS 2 Humble with ament CMake installed, and several Ubuntu Jammy jobs with different setups. Each job checks out the repository, performs environment-specific setup, and runs build and test scripts.
